creator: gallasch@free.de
text:
Hi.

I have a DL145 G3 with the same problem. The server is able to boot the =
8.3RC1 memstick image.
When installing 8.3RC1 on the server and doing the freebsd-update to 9.0 =
REL the DL145 G3 also will get stuck booting 9.0 REL (Root mount waiting =
for: usbus2)=20

John, here is your requested output of pciconf -lv (from a running =
8.3RC1 memstick)

Also: Would it make sense to try following ehci tunables in loader.conf =
or are they unrelated ?

   hw.usb.ehci.lostintrbug
   hw.usb.ehci.iaadbug
   hw.usb.ehci.no_hs

Kai Gallasch


Fixit# pciconf -lv

chip=3D0x00361166 rev=3D0x00 hdr=3D0x01
